en: He was just trying to get me home I didn't want to listen but he was right
ko: 그는 그냥 날 집에 보내려 한 거였어. 듣기 싫었지만 그가 맞았어.

en: Nothing is more important than family
I'm ready to accept your blessing and your conditions But first I need to
ko: 축복을 받을 준비가 됐어요. 조건도요. 근데 먼저

en: find De La Cruz to get Hector's photo What So he can see Coco again Hector should be on our ofrenda
ko: 데 라 크루즈를 찾아서 헥토르 사진을 가져와야 해요. 뭐? 코코를 다시 볼 수 있게요. 헥토르는 우리 제단에 있어야 해요.

en: He's part of our family He left this family He tried to go home to you and Coco but De La Cruz murdered him
ko: 우리 가족이에요. 이 가족을 떠났잖아! 집에 가려다 데 라 크루즈한테 살해당했어요.

en: And so what if it's true You leave me alone with a child to raise and I'm just supposed to forgive you
ko: 그래서 뭐 어쨌다고? 아이 하나 남기고 떠나놓고 용서하라고?

en: I'm running out of time It's Coco
You don't have to forgive him But we shouldn't forget him
ko: 용서 안 해도 돼요. 하지만 잊으면 안 돼요.
